since_last: 33% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.49%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +2.67% · Gold -0.02% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 33% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.49%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.49%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.96%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +5.11%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +5.11%, LSCC +5.00%, MU +4.43%, VRT +3.59%, INTC +3.07%. Laggards: SPCX -4.04%, SAP -2.79%, GOOGL -2.29%, APP -2.28%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.04% at $177.53
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.04% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
